name: Thumbprint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine brown sugar, butter, egg yolk and flour. Mix well.
2. Shape dough into small balls. Beat egg white.
3. Roll each ball in egg white, then in chopped nuts.
4. Place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
6. Bake for 2 minutes.
7. Remove from oven and push a thumbprint in each ball.
8. Bake for approximately 2 more minutes.
9. Garnish with icing, maraschino cherries, or chocolate kisses.
